title: karpatiosorbus perlonga
intro: Karpatiosorbus perlonga, also known as the Sorbus perlonga, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family Rosaceae, native to the Carpathian Mountains in Eastern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anthraquinone glycosides content, which helps to stimulate bowel movements and alleviate constipation. The health benefits of Karpatiosorbus perlonga also include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various infections and skin conditions. Karpatiosorbus perlonga can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
